title: Currencies
subtitle: Manage exchange rates for your portfolio. ECB-sourced rates fetch automatically; you can add or override rates manually.
importHint: Upload an ECB eurofxref-hist.csv to bulk-import historical rates.
noPairs: No currency pairs yet. Add a rate or import an ECB CSV to start.
selectPair: Select a pair to view its rate history.
noRates: No rates for this pair yet.
selectPairFirst: Select a currency pair before adding a rate.

errors.invalidCurrencyCode: Currency must be a 3-letter ISO code (e.g., EUR).
errors.invalidDate: Date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.
errors.invalidRate: Rate must be a positive number.
errors.duplicateRate: A rate already exists for this pair and date.
errors.rateNotFoundOrNotManual: This rate cannot be edited (ECB-sourced or missing).

unresolvedFx.title: Unresolved exchange rates
unresolvedFx.description: Add a rate for each currency pair to include these securities in portfolio totals.
unresolvedFx.allResolved: All rates resolved — you can close this dialog.
